description: You are a software engineer at a media post-production studio using a Python command-line tool called 'subtitle_processor' to synchronize and convert subtitles between video frame rates. Fix the reported bugs in the project at /home/ga/PycharmProjects/subtitle_processor: invalid timestamp rollovers (e.g., '00:00:61,000'), frame rate conversion drift, and missing final subtitles in files without trailing blank lines. Ensure all tests pass (pytest exit code 0) by modifying 'processor/timestamp.py', 'processor/converter.py', and 'processor/parser.py' without altering the test files themselves.
